metadata.title: I Tried Replit Agent 4 - Is It Worth the Hype?
metadata.description:
Try Agent 4 - https://replit.com/refer/codewithharry
Agent 4 is Replit’s newest AI building agent that lets you plan, design, and build at the same time. Instead of waiting for code to finish before moving forward, you can run multiple agents in parallel, iterate on designs in an infinite canvas, and ship full projects faster.

When you sign up and upgrade using my link:
• You get $10 in Replit credits
• I get $10 in credits
